zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Curli於大約1223年出生在英國瓦維其可爾布德布盧可時，她的父親William Curli25歲，母親Escholace23歲。她於1242年與Robert Hastang在英國瓦維其可爾利阿明頓 海斯廷斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國瓦維其可爾拉德布洛可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Curli于大约1223年出生在英国瓦維其可爾布德布盧可时，她的父亲William Curli25岁，母亲Escholace23岁。她于1242年与Robert Hastang在英国瓦維其可爾利阿明頓 海斯廷斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国瓦維其可爾拉德布洛可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Curli
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pio, Aldo, Alessio, Dino, Domenico, Egidio, Gino, Giovanni, Guido, Reno.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Carlo  . It is also found in Slovenia; compare 3 below.

variants.name: Carlo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Juan, Julio, Luis, Orlando, Ricardo, Aida, Alicia, Andres, Angel.  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Silvio, Antonio, Carmela, Salvatore.
Italian: from the personal name Carlo, an equivalent of Charles .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Curli was born about 1223, in Budbrooke, Warwickshire, England, her father, William Curli, was 25 and her mother, Escholace, was 23. She married Robert Hastang in 1242, in Leamington Hastings, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in Ladbroke, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Curli est née environ 1223, à Budbrooke, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William Curli, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Escholace, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Hastang en 1242, à Leamington Hastings, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Ladbroke, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Curli um 1223 in Budbrooke, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Curli 25 und ihre Mutter Escholace 23. Sie hat 1242 in Leamington Hastings, Warwickshire, England Robert Hastang geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Ladbroke, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Curli è nata il circa 1223 nel Budbrooke, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, William Curli, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Escholace, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Robert Hastang nel 1242, nel Leamington Hastings, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel Ladbroke, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Curliが約1223年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアブドブルークで生まれた時，父William Curliは25歳，母Escholaceは23歳であった。1242年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアリーミントン ハスティングズでRobert Hastangと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスワーウィクシュアイアラドブロクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Curli(이)가 대략 1223년 영국 워윅실르 버드브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Curli(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Escholace(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1242년 영국 워윅실르 리밍턴 하스틴그스에서 Robert Hastang(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 워윅실르 라드브로크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Curli nasceu aproximadamente 1223, em Budbrooke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Curli, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Escholace, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Hastang em 1242, em Leamington Hastings, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Ladbroke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Curli родилась около 1223 г. в местности будбрук, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Curli было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Escholace, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Hastang в 1242 г. в местности лимингтон хастингс, варвиккшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности ладброк, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Curli nació aproximadamente 1223, en Budbrooke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Curli, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Escholace, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Robert Hastang en 1242, en Leamington Hastings, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en Ladbroke, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
